- Blockers: No S1P5T03-R delivery blocker remains after GitHub Actions run `28027759062` uploaded artifact `7821452823` and passed 30/30 real historical as-of replay gates. ### `ITER-20260714-ADP-V03-REBUILD-MINIMAL-LOOP`

- Facts: V0.3 rebuild landed as `src/adp` (five-stage loop; FSRS-6 via py-fsrs 6.3.1; sentence-bound lessons; fail-closed delivery; correction propagation); parameters single-sourced in `config/thresholds_v0_3.yaml` (`MOD-ADP-122` / `FORM-ADP-124` / `PARAM-ADP-1109..1121`); run manifests cover three real dates spanning 62.1h; an 8-angle review audit produced fixes recorded in `arxiv-daily-push/docs/v03/04_开发记录/问题台账.md`.
- Boundary: no SMTP send, no scheduler install, no Release, no restore, no DAILY_OPERATION enablement; V7.2 machine lock unchanged.
- Evidence: `arxiv-daily-push/docs/v03/STATUS.yaml`; `arxiv-daily-push/data/run_manifests.jsonl`; `arxiv-daily-push/docs/v03/04_开发记录/CHANGELOG.md`.
- 2026-07-17 V0.1 S5-P03-T065: implemented citation support/counter/mention evidence + graph (closes S5-P03). release_mode NOT_DEPLOYED; read-only library, NO model call, production untouched. New tool docs/pursuing_goal/v0_1/tools/citation_evidence.py: classify_citation (context-only; support/counter/mention from the earliest cue byte-exact in the context; no cue -> mention; ASCII cues word-boundary matched so 'unlike' != 'unlikely') / build_citation_graph (only context fed to classifier; citing_title display-only, never classified) / query_graph / label_has_viewable_context. Deliverables under docs/pursuing_goal/v0_1/evidence/ADP-S5-P03-T065/: citation_evidence_report.json, known_gaps.md, adversarial_review.md (review CONFIRMED_SOUND). Acceptance (test-results/citation_evidence_tests.txt, PASS exit 0): all 6 labels backed by a cue byte-exact in context; not from title -- classify_citation takes only context, two support-titled conflict cases (EN 'supports and confirms', CN 一致) labeled counter because context contradicts, a supportive-titled no-cue citation labeled mention, naive title classifier disagrees on 5 cases; cue precision ('unlikely' not counter, 'inconsistent with' counter, 'unlike ' counter, 'corroborate' support); graph keeps support/counter edges to the same cited paper distinct. Realtime not regressed (no deploy, live build b189d3cc0703 == T040). Cost: prod requests 0 / D1 0 / R2 0 / model 0. NOT self-signed PASS -> IMPLEMENTATION_READY_FOR_INDEPENDENT_VERIFICATION.
- 2026-07-17 V0.1 S5-P03-T064: implemented the Research Set + structured comparison + filtering (S5-P03). release_mode NOT_DEPLOYED; read-only library, production untouched. New tool docs/pursuing_goal/v0_1/tools/research_set.py: extract_fields (label/statistic-driven method/sample/result; every value a byte-exact source span with an evidence locator; no marker -> {value:None, status:'missing'} 缺失不猜) / make_set (Research Set, deterministic order) / comparison_table (rows x method/sample/result, cell value+evidence or missing) / filter_set (reproducible has-field/keyword, deterministic order) / traces_to_source. Deliverables under docs/pursuing_goal/v0_1/evidence/ADP-S5-P03-T064/: research_set_report.json, known_gaps.md, adversarial_review.md (review CONFIRMED_SOUND). Acceptance (test-results/research_set_tests.txt, PASS exit 0): 10 present Golden-Set fields all trace byte-for-byte to source (value == text[offset:offset+length], quote == value) and match the hand label; 5 absent fields reported missing, none fabricated; a hallucinated value and a guess-a-default extractor both rejected by traceability (non-vacuous); has-field filter identical across 3 runs, deterministic + non-trivial subset (P001/P002/P005), keyword filter differs (P001/P003). Realtime not regressed (no deploy, live build b189d3cc0703 == T040). Cost: prod requests 0 / D1 0 / R2 0 / model 0. NOT self-signed PASS -> IMPLEMENTATION_READY_FOR_INDEPENDENT_VERIFICATION.
- 2026-07-17 V0.1 S5-P03-T063: integrated DOI/Crossref/OpenAlex research metadata enhancement (opens S5-P03). release_mode NOT_DEPLOYED; read-only enhancement library, production untouched. New tool docs/pursuing_goal/v0_1/tools/research_metadata.py: make_crossref_adapter / make_openalex_adapter (fixture-backed; enhancement | None | raise AdapterError) / enhance (additive source-tagged enhancements; original paper deepcopied as immutable evidence anchor; adapter gets a throwaway copy; ANY adapter exception -> failed, never blocks) / run_pipeline (degraded fallback) / link_works (preprint->journal linked ONLY on Crossref has_preprint_arxiv_id == this arxiv_id; versions stay distinct in type+evidence, preprint never relabeled, unconfirmed DOI never links) / resolve_authors (reuses T058 entity_resolver). Deliverables under docs/pursuing_goal/v0_1/evidence/ADP-S5-P03-T063/: research_metadata_report.json, known_gaps.md, adversarial_review.md (review CONFIRMED_SOUND). Acceptance (test-results/research_metadata_tests.txt, PASS exit 0): preprint/journal not confused (confirmed publication -> preprint[arXiv] + journal[Crossref DOI] distinct+linked, preprint never relabeled; unconfirmed DOI adds no journal, confirming it WOULD -> gate load-bearing; same-title not merged); enhancement failure does not block (5 in/5 out blocked 0, original byte-identical + never mutated, failures recorded failed, KeyError adapter keeps all, mutating adapter cannot corrupt, drop-on-failure would keep 2/5); authors unified across sources without confusing distinct people. Realtime not regressed (no deploy, live build b189d3cc0703 == T040). Cost: prod requests 0 / D1 0 / R2 0 / model 0. NOT self-signed PASS -> IMPLEMENTATION_READY_FOR_INDEPENDENT_VERIFICATION.
- 2026-07-17 V0.1 S5-P02-T062: implemented the version timeline / as-of / old-vs-new diff API (S5-P02). release_mode NOT_DEPLOYED; read-only API library, production untouched. New tool docs/pursuing_goal/v0_1/tools/version_asof_api.py: version_timeline (folds renders into substantive versions; noise-only re-render never becomes a version; carries noise-stripped body snapshot) / diff_payload (line-level locatable add/delete/modify with line numbers + exact text, over the noise-stripped body so template noise is never shown) / as_of (version in force as of a date, parsed-date, never future; reuses T056) / replay_version + replay_is_idempotent (deterministic old-version reconstruction, idempotent). Reuses T026 version_engine + T056 coverage_asof. Deliverables under docs/pursuing_goal/v0_1/evidence/ADP-S5-P02-T062/: version_asof_report.json, known_gaps.md, adversarial_review.md (review CONFIRMED_SOUND). - 2026-07-16 V0.1 DIR-007 free-tier hard budget: the Owner enabled Cloudflare R2 and issued a hard directive that the entire ADP and ALL repositories must never exceed the Cloudflare free tier, no agent may exceed usage or change/raise quota limits unless the Owner repeatedly confirms and explicitly authorizes, and usage must be continuously monitored and kept in-budget (fail-closed). Free-tier limits: R2 Storage 10 GB/mo, Class A ops 1,000,000/mo, Class B ops 10,000,000/mo; plan stays Free (FACT-013), no upgrade without repeated Owner authorization. - 2026-07-15 batch 16: self-hosted the hero videos on the Worker to remove the fragile external CloudFront dependency (Owner fully authorized, but does not want to touch the dashboard). R2 (the v1.1 red-line 4 recommendation) needs a one-time Cloudflare dashboard enable, which is a billing/terms action I did not take on the Owner behalf; instead used Cloudflare Workers static assets -- free, same-origin, durable, no dashboard step. Downloaded the three still-live reference clips (Velorah/Space-Voyage/Aethera) and compressed them with ffmpeg (obtained via the pip package imageio-ffmpeg, no system install) to 1280x720 H.264 no-audio faststart loops: 62MB -> 7MB total (velorah 1.5MB, voyage 1.9MB, aethera 2.5MB), also much lighter for mobile. Stored under deploy/cloudflare/assets/media, added a wrangler assets binding (assets.directory ./assets), pointed HERO_VIDEO at same-origin /media/*.mp4, and tightened the CSP media-src back to self (CloudFront removed entirely). The 7MB of mp4 were force-added past the arxiv-daily-push/.gitignore media/ rule because durability requires them versioned (there is no longer a live source to regenerate from; CLAUDE.md permits binaries when the task needs them). Deployed adp-cloud (assets uploaded, 3 files) and live-verified: /media/velorah.mp4 /voyage.mp4 /aethera.mp4 all serve 200 video/mp4 same-origin, the response CSP media-src is now self only, and minimal plays from /media/velorah.mp4 (paused=false, currentTime advancing, videoWidth 1280). cosmos keeps the dashboard (its NOVA clip was already 403).
- 2026-07-15 batch 15: restored the today-page HERO first-screen -- the ACTUAL original theme motion. The Owner supplied the real v1.1 design package (ADP系统重构方案 v1.1) and said the original motion was still gone after ten changes. Reading the spec made the miss clear: the signature motion was never the ambient CSS layer I kept tuning -- it is the today-page hero first-screen, which the cloud port dropped completely. Restored into deploy/cloudflare/worker_cloud.js per the v1.1 first-screen/nav contract: THEME_HERO map + data-hero attribute drive, on the today page, a full-screen hero VIDEO for minimal/techno/forest (the three live CloudFront reference clips Velorah / Space Voyage / Aethera) with eyebrow -> giant serif title (today pick, per-char BlurText for techno) -> subtitle -> glass CTA over a per-theme gradient mask, and for cosmos the knowledge-vitals DASHBOARD (SVG ring gauge counting 000->today-score/104, STREAK/RETENTION/REVIEW-DEBT grid, 7-pick sparkline) over the galaxy fx (its NOVA video is 403 dead). warm/fresh stay clean. Video handling follows the v1.1 red-lines exactly: src assigned by JS (not on the tag), muted/loop as explicit booleans, play().catch plus an oncanplay handler so it never sticks on a frozen first frame (the exact failure red-line 1 warns about); added a media-src CSP entry for the CloudFront host. node --check clean; deployed adp-cloud (905513ff) and live-verified per theme in a FRESH no-cache tab: minimal (Velorah), techno (Space Voyage) and forest (Aethera) videos all actually play (paused=false, currentTime advancing, videoWidth>0), and the cosmos gauge animated to 094 with the vitals/sparkline rendered. Caveat recorded for the Owner: the reference videos live on external CloudFront and one (NOVA) is already dead, so they should be moved to owner R2 storage for durability (v1.1 red-line 4).
- 2026-07-15 batch 14: made the theme motion boldly visible + fixed the cache that was hiding every deploy from the Owner. After batch 13 the Owner still saw no motion on both computer and phone even on a fresh URL. DOM inspection (getComputedStyle/elementFromPoint) proved the fx layer rendered (display block, full viewport, stars gradient present) but was TOO FAINT to perceive, and -- the actual blocker -- the browser was serving a fully CACHED page (computed card bg still 0.58, band 90s: the OLD css) despite cache-control no-cache; these browsers store no-cache responses and skip revalidation, so the Owner never received any of the recent deploys. Two fixes in deploy/cloudflare/worker_cloud.js: (1) htmlResp cache-control no-cache -> no-store, must-revalidate (browsers always refetch; confirmed live via curl); (2) amplified the ambient fx for real visibility -- cosmos gets on-screen nebula-glow backgrounds + a conic aurora sweep (banddrift 22s) + brighter/denser twinkling stars + a 6s glowing meteor, and cosmos .card is made translucent (rgba 0.40) so the galaxy shows through the content; techno clouds enlarged/brightened; minimal gains a moving light shaft; forest slopes raised to 210px with a slow sway. Verified in a FRESH no-cache browser tab (computed card 0.40, band 22s, nebula bg present): the cosmos galaxy (bright star field + violet/blue nebulae) and techno clouds are now unmistakable at desktop width; deployed adp-cloud (d5890974). The no-cache->no-store change is the key reason the Owner will finally see updates.
- 2026-07-15 batch 13: restored the six-theme ambient MOTION layers (Owner: "the 6 themes just change one color -- the original 动效 design is all gone; don't fix A and lose B"). Root cause: the Stage 2 six-theme port into deploy/cloudflare/worker_cloud.js had copied only the colour tokens and layout, dropping every per-theme animated layer that the local design source src/adp/templates/base.html defines. Restored them faithfully as pure CSS/SVG (no external dependency, CSP-safe): a THEME_FX map + a data-fx attribute (set in HEAD_INIT no-flash init and applyTheme, validated + self-healing like the theme guard) drives fixed aria-hidden background layers -- cosmos: galaxy (banddrift light band, 3 nebula glows, two twinkle star fields, an 11s meteor); techno: 3 drifting white fluid clouds (clouddrift); minimal: ocean top-light + deep radial vignette; forest: layered hill-slope SVG + water band -- plus a .card fade-in entrance (frise) and a prefers-reduced-motion guard that disables all of it. warm/fresh stay clean (no fx) exactly as in the original design. The external CloudFront hero videos in base.html were intentionally NOT ported (CSP + dependency fragility; the CSS ambient layers carry the motion). Content sits above the fx via z-index (main/nav/footer raised, fx at z-index 0, pointer-events none). node --check clean; deployed adp-cloud (99752091) and live-verified per theme on adp.linzezhang.com at both desktop and phone width: cosmos stars+nebulae, techno clouds, minimal ocean depth, forest slopes all render, with the ChatGPT button and theme self-heal intact.
- 2026-07-15 batch 12: theme-selector self-heal hotfix (Owner: "the webpage's 6 themes are gone / still not restored"). Root cause reproduced in-browser: the six-theme picker read localStorage 'adp-theme' and applied it without validating, so a stale/invalid stored value (from an earlier build) or an Object.prototype key ('constructor','__proto__','toString') made data-theme invalid -> no matching [data-theme] CSS -> page fell back to the default warm tokens, AND the native <select> got selectedIndex -1 -> blank switcher; to the Owner this looked like all 6 themes vanished and their chosen theme was not restored. Fix (deploy/cloudflare/worker_cloud.js): HEAD_INIT + THEME_JS now validate the stored theme with Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(THEMES,s) (via an isTheme() helper) and fall back to 'warm' when it is not one of the 6, and applyTheme persists the corrected value so the bad entry self-heals on first load. Live-verified on adp.linzezhang.com: stored 'aurora' and 'constructor' both self-heal to warm with the switcher showing 暖纸学习, and picking 森林河流 persists across navigation. Note: the in-app preview browser served a cached page during testing (cache-buster needed); real HTML is no-cache so a normal phone refresh delivers the fix.
- 2026-07-15 batch 11: ChatGPT deep-dive button + local cleanup (Owner: "delete useless local info; add a jump to ChatGPT so it traverses the whole web, thinks/searches deeply, gives some surprises, and explains the content in a detailed, professional, comprehensive, deep way"). Feature (deploy/cloudflare/worker_cloud.js): a per-item "让 ChatGPT 全网深度追问" button on today/item/review that opens chatgpt.com/?hints=search&q= prefilled with the item's title/authors/categories/original-link/abstract and a Chinese instruction block (live deep web search + cross-check with citable sources; deep reasoning on problem/method/assumptions/innovation/limits; detailed professional comprehensive deep explanation for someone who wants to truly learn it, with apt analogies; give surprises — unexpected links, counter-intuitive conclusions, overlooked angles; end with a "what to read/do next" list), plus a topic deep-dive on /search; rendered href is esc()'d (encodeURIComponent leaves only the literal & to become &amp;), no injection surface; live-verified on adp.linzezhang.com across today/item/review/search with the decoded prompt correct. Local cleanup (no tracked-file change): the retired mirror/tunnel architecture no longer backs adp.linzezhang.com, so unloaded the com.linze.adp.web (uvicorn 8787) and com.linze.adp.tunnel (cloudflared) LaunchAgents and removed their installed plists, the ~/.cloudflared/adp-tunnel-token, the 38MB var/bin/cloudflared binary, and the dead logs; the reinstall templates stay under deploy/cloudflare/launchd/, and the site still serves 200 on all routes afterward, confirming the local residue was genuinely unused.

Cutover: adp.linzezhang.com detached from adp-mirror and bound to adp-cloud (Owner "the site I check is adp.linzezhang.com"); all routes verified 200 independent of the Mac; old mirror worker + local tunnel/web LaunchAgents left dormant. Features (all in deploy/cloudflare/worker_cloud.js): learning-stats dashboard (streak/due/mastered/learning/recall-rate), guided review session /review, board browsing /board/:id, search /search, history /history, item detail /item/:id, and study-any-item POST /api/study/:id. Polish: meta/og/theme-color/favicon, security headers (CSP/nosniff/referrer-policy), no-store APIs, themed 404/error pages, robots, aria. Live-verified incl. study→review flow.
- 2026-07-15 batch 9: cloud-native rebuild Stage 2 (all in deploy/cloudflare/worker_cloud.js): ported the six-theme design language from base.html (warm/minimal/fresh/techno/cosmos/forest tokens + sidebar/topbar/dock nav via body[data-nav] + localStorage theme dropdown; live-verified theme switching); replaced board3's datacenter-IP-blocked Google News with Chinese-media RSS (people.com.cn, chinanews, sina — 75 clean items verified from Cloudflare); switched feed rotation to per-board staleness (4 stalest per board per run) so every board refreshes within the free-tier subrequest cap; added charset-aware fetch (gb2312->gb18030) and orphan-source cleanup; fixed a sidebar selector bug (nav.nav-side vs aside.nav-side). Board items: b1 270/b2 121/b3 75/b4 140. Separate adp-cloud worker; adp.linzezhang.com untouched until Stage 3.

Live-verified on adp-cloud.linzezhang35.workers.dev (arXiv 220 all-fields, bioRxiv 30, 217+ candidates, econ paper selected, recall→FSRS 3-day interval in D1). Free-tier subrequest cap handled by batched D1 writes + rotating feeds. bioRxiv also promoted to normal ingestion in the live local system.
